content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1/5.6.3 WARN — Rating gate dark pattern: custom star UI routes ≥4-star users to a direct `write-review` URL while diverting unhappy users to a feedback form (RatingGateView.swift:18–25), bypassing `SKStoreReviewController`/`requestReview`; metadata also solicits "rate us 5 stars" (en-US/description.txt:1).
Pierre: Apple explicitly forbids review-gating — filtering out negative reviewers to inflate ratings — and expects apps to use the system `requestReview` API rather than deep-linking happy users to the write-review page. The Submit button's branch on `stars >= 4` plus the "rate us 5 stars" metadata copy are textbook manipulation signals reviewers look for. Replace the gate with `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview` shown to all users, and remove the "rate us 5 stars" line from the description.
